title: taraxacum getulum
intro: Taraxacum getulum, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum getulum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tea, capsule, or tincture form, often used to support detoxification and overall well-being.
